about.title: About Me
about.description: Hi, I’m Alexander, a frontend developer focused on building clean, scalable, and user-friendly web experiences.
about.passion: Specialized in Vue.js, TypeScript, real-time applications, UI architecture, and modern frontend development.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.chrono_desc: Engineered interactive interfaces featuring 3D graphics and complex animations. Integrated logistics (DHL) and social APIs to automate core business processes.
projects.crypton_desc: Developed Web3 interfaces for smart contract interaction. Delivered secure frontend solutions for blockchain ecosystems and p2p platforms.
projects.tenzor_desc: Architected and developed scalable UI components for enterprise-level software. Optimized frontend-to-database interactions for high-load systems.
projects.anketolog_desc: Designed the application architecture and logic for a comprehensive survey platform. Built adaptive survey builders with a focus on UX and high conversion rates.
projects.wsender_desc: Architected the project from the ground up and implemented core frontend logic. Developed complex business logic and interfaces for marketing automation services.
projects.emcd_desc: Led a full-scale ecosystem migration from Vue 2 to Vue 3 (Composition API). Developed P2P platforms, real-time WebSocket chats, and B2B dashboards with advanced analytics.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: I'm always open to new opportunities and interesting projects. Get in touch!
